title: Ken
actors: Raizô Ichikawa, Yûsuke Kawazu, Hisaya Morishige
plot: Kokubu Jiro is the captain of his university's Kendo team. Often standoffish, mild, stoic and minimalist, Kokubu is a mystery to those who know him. Kagawa wants to understand Kokubu, but being arrogant and flashy, has a hard time...
